description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Vcpkg Build Release that runs on push to the release branch and on pull requests to the release branch. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with GCC versions 11, 12, and 13. Install dependencies, set up GCC, restore vcpkg and its artifacts from the cache, generate project files with CMake, build the project with Ninja, and upload the resulting artifact.
